title: Let's Move! Action Verbs for K-2
description: A vocabulary pack designed for K-2 ELL newcomer students focusing on common action verbs. Includes bilingual vocabulary, a mini-book, and engaging worksheets.

vocabulary.image_prompt: a child jumping high with a smile
a child eating a healthy snack like an apple
a child drinking water from a cup
a child sleeping peacefully in bed
a child sitting and reading an open book
a child holding a pencil and writing on paper
a child singing with open mouth, maybe holding a pretend microphone
a child dancing with joyful movement
a child playing with a toy or a ball
a child walking on a sidewalk or path
a child sitting on a chair at a table
a child standing tall next to a desk
a child throwing a small soft ball
a child kicking a soccer ball

worksheets.instructions_en: Draw a line from the English word to the matching picture.
worksheets.instructions_l2: Dibuja una línea de la palabra en inglés a la imagen correspondiente.

worksheets.instructions_en: Trace the action verbs. Then say the word!
worksheets.instructions_l2: Traza los verbos de acción. ¡Luego di la palabra!

worksheets.instructions_en: Color the pictures of the action verbs. Say the word as you color!
worksheets.instructions_l2: Colorea las imágenes de los verbos de acción. ¡Di la palabra mientras coloreas!

pages.text_en: I Can Move! Let's learn action verbs!
pages.image_prompt: a group of diverse children moving and playing happily

pages.text_en: I can run. I can run fast!
pages.text_l2: Yo puedo correr. ¡Yo puedo correr rápido!

pages.text_en: I can jump. I can jump high!
pages.text_l2: Yo puedo saltar. ¡Yo puedo saltar alto!
pages.image_prompt: a child jumping with arms up

pages.text_en: I can eat. I can eat healthy food!
pages.text_l2: Yo puedo comer. ¡Yo puedo comer comida saludable!
pages.image_prompt: a child eating a carrot or a piece of fruit

pages.text_en: I can drink. I can drink water!
pages.text_l2: Yo puedo beber. ¡Yo puedo beber agua!
pages.image_prompt: a child drinking from a water bottle

pages.text_en: I can read. I can read a book!
pages.text_l2: Yo puedo leer. ¡Yo puedo leer un libro!
pages.image_prompt: a child looking at a picture book

pages.text_en: I can write. I can write my name!
pages.text_l2: Yo puedo escribir. ¡Yo puedo escribir mi nombre!
pages.image_prompt: a child writing with a crayon or pencil

pages.text_en: What can you do? What action verbs do you know?
pages.text_l2: ¿Qué puedes hacer tú? ¿Qué verbos de acción conoces?
pages.image_prompt: a child thinking with a question mark above their head

teacher_notes.objective: Students will be able to identify and use common action verbs in English and Spanish, both receptively and productively.
teacher_notes.suggested_use: Introduce verbs with Total Physical Response (TPR) and gestures. Use vocabulary flashcards for practice. Read the mini-book together, pointing to actions and encouraging students to mimic. Complete worksheets as a class or in small groups. Encourage students to create simple sentences using the verbs.
differentiation_tips: **Support:** Provide strong visual cues and model actions extensively. Pair students with a peer who has stronger English skills. Use sentence frames (e.g., 'I can ______.') for verbal practice. Allow students to point to pictures instead of verbalizing if needed.

**Challenge:** Encourage students to use the verbs in simple sentences or create their own action drawings. Ask them to act out other action verbs not covered in the pack. Have them describe what they can do using 'I can...' statements.
